sections.paragraph:
ἐκκολυμβάω 1 aor. ἐξεκολύμβησα (s. κολυμβάω; Eur., Hel. 1609; Diod S 20, 86, 4; 20, 88, 6; Dionys. Hal. 5, 24) (dive overboard and) swim away (Anticleides [III b.c.]: 140 Fgm. 4 Jac.; Diod S 14, 73, 4) Ac 27:42.—DELG s.v. κόλυμβος.

aor. aor. = aorist

Eur Eur , V b.c.—List 5

Diod S Diod S , I b.c.—List 5

Fgm. Fgm. = fragment, fragmentary

Jac. Jac. = Die Fragmente der griechischen Historiker, ed. FJacoby—Lists 5, 6

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 305
